habitat: Damp meadows, stream banks, and woodland edges of Europe and Western Asia.
traditionalUsesEn: Relief of mild nervous tension and sleep difficulty associated with restlessness.
traditionalUsesDe: Relief von mild nervous tension und sleep difficulty associated mit restlessness.
activeCompounds: Valerenic acid and derivatives, valepotriates (in fresh material), essential oil, GABA-related constituents
preparation: Dried root tea, tincture, standardized extracts (capsules/tablets).
cautions: May cause drowsiness; avoid combining with sedatives or alcohol without advice. Characteristic strong odor of dried root.
historicalNotes: Used since classical antiquity; listed in European pharmacopoeias for mild sleep and stress support.
habitatDe: Damp Wiesen, stream banks, und Waldränder von Europa und westlich Asia.
activeCompoundsDe: Valerenic acid und derivatives, valepotriates (in frisch material), ätherisches Öl, GABA-verwandt constituents
preparationDe: Getrocknet Wurzel Tee, Tinktur, standardisiert Extrakte (capsules/tablets).
cautionsDe: May cause drowsiness; meiden combining mit sedatives oder alcohol ohne fachlichen Rat. Characteristic strong odor von getrocknet Wurzel.
historicalNotesDe: Used since classical antiquity; listed in europäisch pharmacopoeias für mild sleep und stress support.
